guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 13. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_sh: Point to the big SH and say: shshsh. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ch: Now point to the big CH and say: chchch.

parent_story: She saw a shiny shell on the beach. A chipmunk chirped next to the shell.
